text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for my debut! I've been really
looking forward to today, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The crowd seems worried about how young I am,
and they appear to doubt whether Trainer is
doing a good job supporting me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If I work really hard, will people eventually
acknowledge and praise Trainer too?
